creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
I'll confirm  Marco Beishuizen's report; my attempt was running stable/12:
FreeBSD g1-48.catwhisker.org 12.2-STABLE FreeBSD 12.2-STABLE #898 r368545M/368550: Fri Dec 11 03:34:25 PST 2020     root@g1-48.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/CANARY  amd64 1202504 1202504

I was attempting to update an existing abiword-3.0.1_17 install to abiword-3.0.4.  A subsequent deletion of  abiword-3.0.1_17 had no effect on the symptoms.

I expect my package-builder will be trying to build it tomorrow (via poudriere).
